The collection

A photographic study of the manul

Eighteen frames across portrait, habitat, and life history. Select any image to view it full size.

Portraits & detail

The face, the eyes, and the extraordinary coat that define the species.

Habitat & landscape

The open steppe, rocky ridges, and high country the manul calls home.

Life & behavior

Kittens, rest, winter survival, and the hunt.

The Manul Atlas

A comprehensive visual field guide to Otocolobus manul — the Pallas's cat of the Central Asian steppe.

About
